ceo_message.title: General Manager's Message
ceo_message.opening: In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
ceo_message.p1: Praise be to Allah, who made perfection the basis of success, and peace and blessings be upon our master Muhammad and his family and companions. I am pleased, on behalf of myself and the family of Tasweeqar Contracting, to welcome you, and to express our pride in the journey our company has steadily and confidently taken towards leadership and excellence in the contracting and construction sector.
ceo_message.p2: Tasweeqar Contracting was launched with a clear vision and a firm ambition based on quality, creativity, and commitment, placing at the forefront our active contribution to supporting development and infrastructure projects, in accordance with the highest engineering and professional standards, to keep pace with the modern developments in this vital sector.
ceo_message.p3: Believing that real success is built on trust and responsibility, we have been keen to establish the values of integrity, professionalism, and commitment in all our endeavors, relying on qualified cadres, specialized expertise, and advanced technologies that enable us to execute projects with high efficiency and sustainable quality within the specified timeframes.
ceo_message.p4: The achievements made by our company would not have been possible without the grace of Allah first, then the trust of our valued clients and partners, and the dedication of our working team, which we are proud of and consider the main pillar of our journey and continuous success.
ceo_message.p5: Today, we continue to work with greater determination and an even more ambitious vision towards a future built on excellence, innovation, and sustainability, striving for Tasweeqar Contracting to be a role model in quality, reliability, and execution.
ceo_message.p6: In conclusion, we extend our sincere gratitude and appreciation to everyone who has placed their trust in us, reaffirming our constant commitment to providing the best services and achieving the highest levels of satisfaction for our valued clients and partners. And Allah is the arbiter of success,,,
ceo_message.name: Mohammad Fadel Al-Waili
